headline: Globe Life (GL) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
summary: Globe Life (GL) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Overweight on Globe Life, Raises Price Target to $200
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Paul Newsome   maintains Globe Life (NYSE:GL) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $175 to $200.
